rice.symptoms: Yellowing and drying of plants, hopper burn
rice.prevention: Avoid excessive nitrogen. Use resistant varieties. Maintain field drainage.
rice.treatment: Apply imidacloprid or thiamethoxam. Drain water from fields.

rice.symptoms: Dead heart in vegetative stage, white ear heads
rice.prevention: Early planting. Remove stubbles. Light traps.
rice.treatment: Apply carbofuran granules. Release Trichogramma wasps.

rice.symptoms: Folded leaves with feeding marks, white streaks
rice.treatment: Spray chlorpyrifos or quinalphos when >2 folded leaves/hill.

rice.symptoms: Diamond-shaped lesions on leaves, neck rot

wheat.symptoms: Curling leaves, honeydew on plants, stunted growth
wheat.prevention: Early sowing. Balanced nitrogen. Natural enemies.

wheat.symptoms: Orange-brown pustules on leaves and stems
Wilting plants, roots damaged, hollow stems
wheat.prevention: Deep plowing. Adequate irrigation. Remove crop residue.
wheat.treatment: Seed treatment with chlorpyrifos. Apply fipronil to soil.

maize.symptoms: Holes in leaves, frass in whorl, skeletonized leaves
maize.treatment: Apply spinetoram or emamectin benzoate. Release natural enemies.

maize.symptoms: Dead heart, shot holes in leaves, broken stems
maize.treatment: Apply carbofuran granules in leaf whorl.

maize.symptoms: Feeding damage on ear tips, frass on silk
maize.treatment: Apply spinosad or Bt insecticide to silks.

cotton.symptoms: Bored bolls, frass, shed squares and bolls
cotton.prevention: Use Bt cotton. Trap crops. Pheromone traps.
cotton.treatment: Apply profenofos or emamectin benzoate sprays.

cotton.symptoms: Yellowing leaves, sticky honeydew, sooty mold
cotton.prevention: Neem oil spray. Yellow sticky traps. Remove weeds.

cotton.symptoms: Rosetted flowers, damaged bolls, webbing inside bolls
cotton.prevention: Early harvest. Destroy crop residue. Pheromone traps.

tomato.symptoms: Holes in fruit, frass, rotting fruit
tomato.prevention: Pheromone traps. Neem oil spray. Crop rotation.

tomato.symptoms: Serpentine mines on leaves, reduced photosynthesis
tomato.prevention: Yellow sticky traps. Remove infested leaves.

tomato.symptoms: Yellowing, leaf curl virus transmission, honeydew
tomato.prevention: Reflective mulch. Sticky traps. Resistant varieties.

potato.symptoms: Water-soaked lesions, white mold, tuber rot
potato.treatment: Apply metalaxyl + mancozeb. Destroy infected plants.

potato.symptoms: Curled leaves, stunted growth, virus transmission
Mining in leaves and tubers, frass
potato.prevention: Deep planting. Adequate earthing up. Harvest timely.
potato.treatment: Apply quinalphos. Storage treatment with DDVP.

sugarcane.symptoms: Dead hearts, bore holes in shoots
sugarcane.prevention: Use healthy seed sets. Remove infested shoots.

sugarcane.symptoms: Bunchy top appearance, dead hearts in grown cane
sugarcane.prevention: Light traps. Detrashing. Remove infested canes.
